creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
I removed *all* packages from my system, removed /var/db/pkg and only 
installed portupgrade and bash. Then I tried to install amavisd-new:

===>  Installing for db42-4.2.52_5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if databases/db42 already installed
===>   db42-4.2.52_5 is already installed
      You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
      by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
      If you really wish to overwrite the old port of databases/db42
      without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
      in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/db42.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/amavisd-new.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa 
/tmp/portinstall20100609-59474-1cbe1aw-0 env 
make -DWITH_BDB -DWITH_SNMP -DWITH_POF -DWITH_RAR -DWITH_UNRAR -DWITH_UNARJ  
-DWITH_NOMARCH -DWITH_UNZOO -DWITH_TNEF BATCH=YES
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! security/amavisd-new  (unknown build error)
#

I then removed db42 and tried to install amavisd-new:

[...]
Installing documentation: /usr/local/share/doc/db42 ...
/bin/ln -s -f db42/libdb-4.2.so.2 /usr/local/lib
/bin/ln -s -f libdb-4.2.so.2 /usr/local/lib/libdb-4.2.so
/bin/ln -s -f db42/libdb_cxx-4.2.so.2 /usr/local/lib
/bin/ln -s -f libdb_cxx-4.2.so.2 /usr/local/lib/libdb_cxx-4.2.so
cd /usr/local/bin/db42 ;  for i in * ; do /bin/ln -s -f db42/$i ../$i-4.2 ; 
done
===>   Running ldconfig
/sbin/ldconfig -m /usr/local/lib
===>   Registering installation for db42-4.2.52_5
===>  Cleaning for db42-4.2.52_5
[Updating the pkgdb <format:bdb_btree> in /var/db/pkg ... - 110 packages 
found (-0 +1) . done]
--->  Installing 'amavisd-new-2.6.4_6,1' from a port (security/amavisd-new)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/security/amavisd-new' with make 
flags: -DWITH_BDB -DWITH_SNMP -DWITH_POF -DWITH_RAR -DWITH_UNRAR -DWITH_UNARJ 
 -DWITH_NOMARCH -DWITH_UNZOO -DWITH_TNEF BATCH=YES

===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for amavisd-new-2.6.4_2,1

 **** UPGRADE WARNING:  SQL SCHEMA CHANGED ****
 If you are upgrading from version prior to 2.6.0
 Hit ^c now and read /usr/ports/UPDATING section or
 /usr/local/share/doc/amavisd-new/RELEASE_NOTES
Hit ^c now to stop, any key to continue:

=> SHA256 Checksum OK for amavisd-new-2.6.4.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for amavisd-new-2.6.4_6,1

===>    Verifying install for db-4.2.2 in /usr/ports/databases/db42
[...]
===>  Installing for db42-4.2.52_5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if databases/db42 already installed
===>   db42-4.2.52_5 is already installed
      You may wish to ``make deinstall'' and install this port again
      by ``make reinstall'' to upgrade it properly.
      If you really wish to overwrite the old port of databases/db42
      without deleting it first, set the variable "FORCE_PKG_REGISTER"
      in your environment or the "make install" command line.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/db42.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/security/amavisd-new.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa 
/tmp/portinstall20100609-85522-e2s5bq-0 env 
make -DWITH_BDB -DWITH_SNMP -DWITH_POF -DWITH_RAR -DWITH_UNRAR -DWITH_UNARJ  
-DWITH_NOMARCH -DWITH_UNZOO -DWITH_TNEF BATCH=YES
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! security/amavisd-new  (unknown build error)
#

appreciate any kind of assistance...
